Home › Seminole County › Dairy-Free Restaurants

Dairy-Free Restaurants in Seminole County

The cleanest of Seminole County's restaurants with dairy-free options is SONNY'S BBQ, a perfect 100/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 44, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

44 dairy-free restaurants

  • A 100 A
    AREPAS, CAFE AND MORE American ★ 4.4 (1124) Altamonte Springs · Seminole County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Apr 2026
